headline: Starbucks Labor Governance Shakeup Puts Investor Focus On Costs And Risks
summary: Starbucks (NasdaqGS:SBUX) dissolved its board committee on labor relations, prompting renewed pressure from activist investors. These investors are urging shareholders to vote against the re-election of two directors at the upcoming annual meeting. The move comes as union contract negotiations resume, with proposals that include higher starting wages. Investors are reassessing governance, labor risk, and potential cost implications that have not yet been widely discussed. For a company...

headline: Starbucks: Improving, But Where Are The Bucks?
summary: Starbucks faces operational woes, shrinking margins, and rising debt despite a turnaround plan. Read the latest analysis on SBUX stock here.

headline: Q4 Earnings Highlights: Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) Vs The Rest Of The Traditional Fast Food Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at traditional fast food stocks, starting with Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX).
